name: public_subnet_tags_per_az
description: Additional tags for the public subnets where the primary key is the AZ

name: elasticache_subnet_private_dns_hostname_type_on_launch
description: The type of hostnames to assign to instances in the subnet at launch. For IPv6-only subnets, an instance DNS name must be based on the instance ID. For dual-stack and IPv4-only subnets, you can specify whether DNS names use the instance IPv4 address or the instance ID. Valid values: `ip-name`, `resource-name`

name: outpost_az
description: AZ where Outpost is anchored

name: reuse_nat_ips
description: Should be true if you don't want EIPs to be created for your NAT Gateways and will instead pass them in via the 'external_nat_ip_ids' variable

name: default_security_group_egress
description: List of maps of egress rules to set on the default security group

name: putin_khuylo
description: Do you agree that Putin doesn't respect Ukrainian sovereignty and territorial integrity? More info: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Putin_khuylo!

name: enable_network_address_usage_metrics
description: Determines whether network address usage metrics are enabled for the VPC

name: elasticache_subnets
description: A list of elasticache subnets inside the VPC

name: intra_route_table_tags
description: Additional tags for the intra route tables

name: outpost_subnet_suffix
description: Suffix to append to outpost subnets name

name: default_security_group_tags
description: Additional tags for the default security group

name: secondary_cidr_blocks
description: List of secondary CIDR blocks to associate with the VPC to extend the IP Address pool

name: database_subnets
description: A list of database subnets inside the VPC

name: elasticache_subnet_group_tags
description: Additional tags for the elasticache subnet group

name: intra_acl_tags
description: Additional tags for the intra subnets network ACL

name: default_route_table_propagating_vgws
description: List of virtual gateways for propagation

name: vpc_flow_log_iam_role_name
description: Name to use on the VPC Flow Log IAM role created

name: private_subnet_assign_ipv6_address_on_creation
description: Specify true to indicate that network interfaces created in the specified subnet should be assigned an IPv6 address. Default is `false`

name: database_subnet_private_dns_hostname_type_on_launch
description: The type of hostnames to assign to instances in the subnet at launch. For IPv6-only subnets, an instance DNS name must be based on the instance ID. For dual-stack and IPv4-only subnets, you can specify whether DNS names use the instance IPv4 address or the instance ID. Valid values: `ip-name`, `resource-name`

name: intra_subnet_ipv6_native
description: Indicates whether to create an IPv6-only subnet. Default: `false`

name: intra_subnet_names
description: Explicit values to use in the Name tag on intra subnets. If empty, Name tags are generated

name: enable_nat_gateway
description: Should be true if you want to provision NAT Gateways for each of your private networks

name: propagate_public_route_tables_vgw
description: Should be true if you want route table propagation

name: redshift_subnet_private_dns_hostname_type_on_launch
description: The type of hostnames to assign to instances in the subnet at launch. For IPv6-only subnets, an instance DNS name must be based on the instance ID. For dual-stack and IPv4-only subnets, you can specify whether DNS names use the instance IPv4 address or the instance ID. Valid values: `ip-name`, `resource-name`

name: enable_vpn_gateway
description: Should be true if you want to create a new VPN Gateway resource and attach it to the VPC

name: dhcp_options_domain_name_servers
description: Specify a list of DNS server addresses for DHCP options set, default to AWS provided (requires enable_dhcp_options set to true)

name: private_outbound_acl_rules
description: Private subnets outbound network ACLs

name: database_subnet_enable_dns64
description: Indicates whether DNS queries made to the Amazon-provided DNS Resolver in this subnet should return synthetic IPv6 addresses for IPv4-only destinations. Default: `true`

name: redshift_subnet_suffix
description: Suffix to append to redshift subnets name

name: redshift_route_table_tags
description: Additional tags for the redshift route tables

name: single_nat_gateway
description: Should be true if you want to provision a single shared NAT Gateway across all of your private networks

name: propagate_intra_route_tables_vgw
description: Should be true if you want route table propagation

name: manage_default_network_acl
description: Should be true to adopt and manage Default Network ACL

name: cidr
description: (Optional) The IPv4 CIDR block for the VPC. CIDR can be explicitly set or it can be derived from IPAM using `ipv4_netmask_length` & `ipv4_ipam_pool_id`

name: instance_tenancy
description: A tenancy option for instances launched into the VPC

name: ipv4_netmask_length
description: (Optional) The netmask length of the IPv4 CIDR you want to allocate to this VPC. Requires specifying a ipv4_ipam_pool_id

name: ipv6_cidr
description: (Optional) IPv6 CIDR block to request from an IPAM Pool. Can be set explicitly or derived from IPAM using `ipv6_netmask_length`

name: private_subnet_tags_per_az
description: Additional tags for the private subnets where the primary key is the AZ

name: create_database_subnet_group
description: Controls if database subnet group should be created (n.b. database_subnets must also be set)

name: default_vpc_enable_dns_support
description: Should be true to enable DNS support in the Default VPC

name: flow_log_traffic_type
description: The type of traffic to capture. Valid values: ACCEPT, REJECT, ALL

name: private_subnet_suffix
description: Suffix to append to private subnets name

name: intra_subnet_tags
description: Additional tags for the intra subnets

name: default_security_group_ingress
description: List of maps of ingress rules to set on the default security group

description: List of maps of egress rules to set on the Default Network ACL

name: vpc_block_public_access_exclusions

name: ipv4_ipam_pool_id
description: (Optional) The ID of an IPv4 IPAM pool you want to use for allocating this VPC's CIDR

description: Specify a list of NTP servers for DHCP options set (requires enable_dhcp_options set to true)

name: dhcp_options_ipv6_address_preferred_lease_time
description: How frequently, in seconds, a running instance with an IPv6 assigned to it goes through DHCPv6 lease renewal (requires enable_dhcp_options set to true)

name: create_database_subnet_route_table
description: Controls if separate route table for database should be created

description: Requests an Amazon-provided IPv6 CIDR block with a /56 prefix length for the VPC. You cannot specify the range of IP addresses, or the size of the CIDR block

name: public_subnet_assign_ipv6_address_on_creation
description: Specify true to indicate that network interfaces created in the specified subnet should be assigned an IPv6 address. Default is `false`

description: Controls if redshift subnet group should be created

name: elasticache_outbound_acl_rules
description: Elasticache subnets outbound network ACL rules

description: Indicates whether to respond to DNS queries for instance hostnames with DNS AAAA records. Default: `true`

description: Indicates whether to respond to DNS queries for instance hostnames with DNS AAAA records. Default: `true`

description: Indicates whether to respond to DNS queries for instance hostnames with DNS A records. Default: `false`

description: Assigns IPv6 public subnet id based on the Amazon provided /56 prefix base 10 integer (0-256). Must be of equal length to the corresponding IPv4 subnet list

description: The customer owned IPv4 address pool. Typically used with the `map_customer_owned_ip_on_launch` argument. The `outpost_arn` argument must be specified when configured

name: redshift_subnet_ipv6_prefixes
description: Assigns IPv6 redshift subnet id based on the Amazon provided /56 prefix base 10 integer (0-256). Must be of equal length to the corresponding IPv4 subnet list

description: Indicates whether DNS queries made to the Amazon-provided DNS Resolver in this subnet should return synthetic IPv6 addresses for IPv4-only destinations. Default: `true`

description: Should be true if you want only one NAT Gateway per availability zone. Requires `var.azs` to be set, and the number of `public_subnets` created to be greater than or equal to the number of availability zones specified in `var.azs`

description: The maximum interval of time during which a flow of packets is captured and aggregated into a flow log record. Valid Values: `60` seconds or `600` seconds

description: (Optional) Netmask length to request from IPAM Pool. Conflicts with `ipv6_cidr_block`. This can be omitted if IPAM pool as a `allocation_default_netmask_length` set. Valid values: `56`

description: Indicates whether DNS queries made to the Amazon-provided DNS Resolver in this subnet should return synthetic IPv6 addresses for IPv4-only destinations. Default: `true`

description: Assigns IPv6 database subnet id based on the Amazon provided /56 prefix base 10 integer (0-256). Must be of equal length to the corresponding IPv4 subnet list

description: Should be true to adopt and manage Default VPC

description: The path for the VPC Flow Log IAM Role

name: private_subnet_ipv6_prefixes
description: Assigns IPv6 private subnet id based on the Amazon provided /56 prefix base 10 integer (0-256). Must be of equal length to the corresponding IPv4 subnet list

name: vpc_tags
description: Additional tags for the VPC

name: database_subnet_group_name
description: Name of database subnet group

name: redshift_subnet_ipv6_native
description: Indicates whether to create an IPv6-only subnet. Default: `false`

name: intra_dedicated_network_acl
description: Whether to use dedicated network ACL (not default) and custom rules for intra subnets

name: outpost_subnet_enable_resource_name_dns_aaaa_record_on_launch
description: Indicates whether to respond to DNS queries for instance hostnames with DNS AAAA records. Default: `true`

name: vpc_flow_log_permissions_boundary
description: The ARN of the Permissions Boundary for the VPC Flow Log IAM Role

name: database_inbound_acl_rules
description: Database subnets inbound network ACL rules

name: azs
description: A list of availability zones names or ids in the region

name: public_subnet_private_dns_hostname_type_on_launch
description: The type of hostnames to assign to instances in the subnet at launch. For IPv6-only subnets, an instance DNS name must be based on the instance ID. For dual-stack and IPv4-only subnets, you can specify whether DNS names use the instance IPv4 address or the instance ID. Valid values: `ip-name`, `resource-name`

name: private_subnet_names
description: Explicit values to use in the Name tag on private subnets. If empty, Name tags are generated

name: private_route_table_tags
description: Additional tags for the private route tables

name: elasticache_subnet_enable_dns64
description: Indicates whether DNS queries made to the Amazon-provided DNS Resolver in this subnet should return synthetic IPv6 addresses for IPv4-only destinations. Default: `true`

name: create_elasticache_subnet_group
description: Controls if elasticache subnet group should be created

name: elasticache_dedicated_network_acl
description: Whether to use dedicated network ACL (not default) and custom rules for elasticache subnets

name: outpost_subnet_enable_dns64
description: Indicates whether DNS queries made to the Amazon-provided DNS Resolver in this subnet should return synthetic IPv6 addresses for IPv4-only destinations. Default: `true`

name: tags
description: A map of tags to add to all resources

name: create_redshift_subnet_route_table
description: Controls if separate route table for redshift should be created

name: public_dedicated_network_acl
description: Whether to use dedicated network ACL (not default) and custom rules for public subnets

name: flow_log_destination_type
description: Type of flow log destination. Can be s3, kinesis-data-firehose or cloud-watch-logs
